titleStmt.title: SII 7.357: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 357. (A.R. No. 160 of 1901). ON THE SIXTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāra
vē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayā
bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1343 neya va¨rttamāna śā¨rvarisaṁvacharada bēsage
yatiṁgaḷu modalāgi rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratā
pa dēvarāyamahārāyaru sā(ṁ)mrājyaṁgeyva kāladalli Ā rāyara
nirūpadiṁda śaṁkaradēvaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu pratipālisuva kāla
dalli hariharadēvaAyyanavara taṁmaṁdiru nāgaṁṇnaAyyanavara makkaḷu dē
vaṁṇnaAyyanavaru lakhaṁṇayyanavara makkaḷu mahāgaṇapatidēvaru hariha
radēvayyanavara makkaḷu caUḍapaṁgaḷu dēvaṁṇayyanavara makkaḷu narahari
dēvaru kriṣṇadēvaAyyanavara makkaḷu viṭhṭhaladēvaru hariharadēvara makkaḷu kriṣṇadē
vaAyyanavaru barasida śāsanada vivara . hiṁde hariharadēvaAyyanavaru
kaṁnyānara Uḷūriṁge bārakūroḷagaṇa hosakeṟeya bāḷu brahmapuri
modalāda gruhakṣētrakke Arasu Anusarigaḷiṁda baṁdaṁthā batta parihari
si koḍuvadakke saṁrakṣābhōgavāgi māḍidaṁthā yeṁṇeyanū hiṁda
kke hiḍikoṁḍu muṁdakke tatsaṁvatsarada kā¨rttika Ārabhyavāgi maṇigāṟage¨ryya
Oḷagaṇa sōmanāthadēvara sōmamaṭhada Oḷataḷuvina dīpōtsavakke nāku hā
ḍa teṁgina Eṁṇeyanu bārakūra bāḷanū Ūḷūranū haccikoṁḍu baṁ
ni svabhāgapramāṇinali hosakeṟeya bāḷu brahmapuri modalāda
sa¨rvvasvada mēle prativaruṣadalli naḍisibahiri [E]ṁdu barasida śi
lāśāsana . yī pramāṇiṁge sākṣigaḷu nariśuvadēvaAyyanava
ru cavuḍappaAyyanavaru mādhavasvāmigaḷa maṁcaṇaAyyanavaru padu
maṁṇaṁgaḷa naraharibhaṭṭaru viśēṣada Aubhaḷadēvara śrīmadrāyarā
jaguru sāmavēdiyajanādiṣaṭka¨rmmanirataraha Ārādhyaru
gaḷa Oppa śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.357 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
